common.logo: Castlery, online furniture shop in Australia
common.keywords: furniture Australia, online furniture Australia, furniture Sydney, furniture Melbourne, furniture shop Australia, furniture stores Australia, furniture in Australia, modern furniture Australia, furniture AU, furniture, Castlery
common.description: Castlery is an online furniture store in Australia which looks to reinvent how furniture retail works. We design and produce furniture with great aesthetics at a competitive price point, without compromising on quality. By cutting out the middleman and keeping our inventory lean we can keep our costs down and extend the savings to you.
common.acknowledgement:
Castlery acknowledges Australia's First Nations as the Traditional Custodians of country throughout Australia and their connections to land, sea and community. 
We pay our respects to their Elders past and present and extend that respect to all Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples today.
common.customized_tips_content: Customised items in your order are made specifically for you and cannot be returned, exchanged, or refunded.

home.name: Home
home.metaDescription: Online furniture store with modern designs for sofas, tables, beds and more. Delivering across Australia. Buy Now Pay Later. 14 Day Easy Returns. Shop Now!

signup.name: Sign Up
signup.subscribe: Yes, I would like to receive marketing emails and special offers from Castlery.

app.name: Castlery App
app.metaDescription: Furnish easier in just a few taps with Castlery App, powered by augmented reality(AR). Your dream home at your fingertips.
app.metaKeywords: AR, Castlery App, augmented reality, dream home

virtual-studio.name: Virtual Studio
virtual-studio.metaDescription: Explore products in our virtual studio any time you like.

blog.name: Blog
blog.metaDescription: Read our blog for furniture styling tips and tricks, guides for proper cleaning and maintenance, and important factors to consider when shopping for your home.

contact-us.name: Contact Us
contact-us.metaDescription: Get in touch with us if you need support or have questions about our products, payments, delivery or returns. Email (via a form), call, live chat or read FAQs.

our-story.name: Our Story
our-story.metaDescription: Furniture shopping was always about filling a room with expensive design trends, but we wanted to turn the tables because everyone deserves a space to thrive.

manufacturing-quality.name: Manufacturing & Quality
manufacturing-quality.metaDescription: Castlery designs, develops and manufactures high quality furniture products through our strong global supply chain of manufacturers. Learn about our expertise.

studio.name: Visit Our Pop-Up
studio.metaDescription: Visit the Castlery Pop-Up Home (Sydney, Supa Centa Moore Park - Floor G) for one-on-one design consultations, free fabric swatches and all your furniture needs.

showroom.name: Visit Showroom
showroom.metaDescription: Discover modern furniture at Castlery's showroom at Supa Centa Moore Park, NSW. Free consultations, fabric samples & more. Shop stylish sofas, dining sets & more.

swatches.name: Free Swatches
swatches.metaDescription: See and feel our swatches in person. Pick up to 3 favourite swatches and we will ship them promptly to your doorstep for free!

zip.name: Zip furniture
zip.metaDescription: Buy now, own it now and pay later with Zip. Up to $1000 interest free always for your furniture purchase at Castlery with Zip Pay. Get started with Zip.
zip.metaKeywords: zip, zip pay, zip money, furniture stores

trade.name: Trade Discount Furniture Program
trade.mainIntro: Exclusive trade program for industry professionals with discounts, expert advice and stylish furniture solutions.
trade.subTitle: Exclusive Trade Program
trade.subIntro: Join Castlery’s trade discount furniture program and receive members-only benefits. We welcome interior designers, architects, trade professionals.
trade.metaDescription: As a member of Castlery Australia’s trade discount furniture program, enjoy exclusive discounts on our furniture products. Join our program today.

delivery.name: Delivery
delivery.metaDescription: Delivery is scheduled to your convenience, subject to available delivery slots. All Castlery products are packaged for safe transit & handled by professionals.

referral.name: Refer a Friend
referral.metaDescription: Enjoy savings for both you and a friend with our referral program. Give $100 off to a friend and you get 100 credits (worth $100) after their first purchase of a minimum $1000.

press.name: Press
press.metaDescription: Read about our press mentions here or get in touch with us. For media enquiries, please contact marketing.au@castlery.com

terms-of-use.name: Terms Of Use
terms-of-use.metaDescription: Your access to and use of the Services (APIs, email notifications, content, etc.) via Castlery's website signifies your acceptance of these Terms of Use.

sales-and-refunds.name: Sales and Refunds
sales-and-refunds.metaDescription: Read our terms and conditions if you need to return a product purchased from us. Learn about our 14-day returns policy, changing/cancelling orders and refunds.

warranty.name: Product Warranty
warranty.metaDescription: Castlery warrants all our furniture is free from defective materials and workmanship. Warranty periods vary by product, commencing from the date of delivery.

promo-terms.name: Promotion Terms & Conditions
promo-terms.metaDescription: Read the terms and conditions for all of Castlery's current special offers and promotions. All start/end times published are at the local Sydney Time (AEST).

privacy-policy.name: Privacy Policy
privacy-policy.metaDescription: All information you provide to us is stored on our secure servers. Any payment transactions will be encrypted using SSL technology. Read our privacy policy.

help-center.name: Help Center
help-center.metaDescription: Get answers for your questions on Castlery’s order & payment methods, shipping & delivery times, refund & warranty policy, product manufacturing and more.

reviews.name: Reviews
reviews.metaDescription: Browse reviews from customers to see what shoppers think about Castlery's modern furniture products and get some styling inspiration while you're at it.

interior-design.name: Interior Design
interior-design.metaDescription: Interior design service by Castlery. Virtual stylish design for you.

furniture-sydney.name: Furniture Sale Sydney
furniture-sydney.metaDescription: Trending, quality furniture designs delivered right to your home in Sydney. Shop online with us for our selection of couches, lounges, TV consoles, bed frames, dining chairs and more today.
furniture-sydney.metaKeywords: Furniture Sydney, Online Furniture Store Sydney

furniture-melbourne.name: Furniture Sale Melbourne
furniture-melbourne.metaDescription: Shop for modern furniture online in Melbourne. We'll deliver our stunning selection of couches, lounges, TV consoles, bed frames, dining chairs right to your doorstep.
furniture-melbourne.metaKeywords: Furniture Melbourne, Online Furniture Store Melbourne

accessories.name: Accessories
accessories.metaDescription: Furnish and give your home the ultimate makeover with beautifully designed home decor products & homeware accessories from Castlery Australia – enough to make anyone swoon.

fabric-care.name: Fabric Care
fabric-care.description: Minor "oops" situations and food spills? No sweat. With a two-step care kit that includes a 5-year protection plan, you can lounge on your fabric or leather sofa with a peace of mind.

outdoor.name: Outdoor
outdoor.metaDescription: Explore outdoor furniture designs that fuel fun in the sun.

stl-living-room.name: Shop The Look - Living Room
stl-living-room.metaDescription: Explore curated living room spaces to get inspiration for styling your Castlery furniture — be it a sofa, armchair, couch, rug, coffee table, ottoman and more!

stl-dining-room.name: Shop The Look - Dining Room
stl-dining-room.metaDescription: Explore curated spaces for inspiration to style your Castlery furniture in the dining room — be it an extendable dining table, chair, rug, sideboard, or bench!

stl-bedroom.name: Shop The Look - Bedroom
stl-bedroom.metaDescription: Explore curated bedroom spaces to get inspiration for styling your Castlery furniture — be it a bed frame, side table, nightstand, armchair, rug, or ottoman!

stl-outdoor.name: Shop The Look - Outdoor
stl-outdoor.metaDescription: Explore curated outdoor spaces for inspiration to style your Castlery furniture — be it a dining table, chair, lounge, sofa, armchair, bench or coffee table!

stl-by-collection.name: Shop The Look - By Collection
stl-by-collection.metaDescription: Explore curated spaces for inspiration to style your Castlery furniture — browse by collections for the home: bedroom, living room, dining room or outdoor.

furniture-configurator-tool.name: Furniture Configurator Tool
furniture-configurator-tool.metaTitle: Create Your Configuration | Furniture Configurator Tool

room-designer.name: Room Designer
room-designer.metaTitle: Design Your Room | Room Design Tool
room-designer.metaDescription: Plan and visualise your room layout with our free online room planner tool. Select from over 1,000 furniture products to create your dream living space.
room-designer.metaKeywords: room planner, room designer, room planner tool, room design tool, room planner online
